languageCheck.core.channel.description: Which core binary channel to use.

languageCheck.core.binaryPath.description: Custom path to the language-check-server binary. Overrides the channel setting.

languageCheck.trace.enable.description: Enable Protobuf message tracing to the output channel.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Language Check
walkthroughs.description: Learn how to check and fix prose in your documents.

steps.title: Check Your Writing
steps.description:
Open a Markdown, HTML, or LaTeX file and save it to automatically check for grammar, spelling, and style issues.

[Check Current Document](command:language-check.checkDocument)

steps.title: SpeedFix: Batch Fix Issues
steps.description:
Press **Alt+F** to open the SpeedFix panel and review all diagnostics at once. Apply fixes, ignore issues, or add words to the dictionary.

[Open SpeedFix](command:language-check.openSpeedFix)

steps.title: Switch Language
steps.description:
Click the language indicator in the Status Bar (bottom right) to switch between English, German, French, and Spanish.

[Select Language](command:language-check.selectLanguage)

steps.title: Configure Rules
steps.description: Create a `.languagecheck.yaml` in your workspace root to disable rules, add auto-fix patterns, or configure engines. See the [documentation](https://github.com) for details.

scripts.proto:gen: pbjs -t static-module -w commonjs -o src/proto/checker.js ../proto/checker.proto && pbts -o src/proto/checker.d.ts src/proto/checker.js
